description: Launch readiness audit for hx-dialog. Checklist: (1) A11y — axe-core zero violations, dialog role, focus trap, Escape to close, aria-labelledby, return focus on close, WCAG 2.1 AA. C-PATTERN-06: register keydown listener before await. C-PATTERN-07: use shadowRoot.activeElement for focus checks. (2) Astro doc page — all 12 template sections. (3) Individual export — standalone HTML works. (4) `npm run verify` passes. Files: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-dialog/`, `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-dialog.md`
